commit.author: claude (local agent run)
commit.message: Add Delete Workspace action to Team Settings

honors.detail: workspace.deletedAt set; 30-day grace before nightly purge
org-scoped invoices anonymized via updateMany on workspace purge
stripe.customers.update on the workspace billing customer; subscriptions canceled first
every workspace member's marketing record set to status=unsubscribed
sendDeletionConfirmationEmail call gates the workspace purge
Delete Workspace button rendered with `bg-[#FF0000]` exactly — Tailwind variant substitution avoided

harvested_rules.name: Revoke member access tokens
harvested_rules.text: Revoke member access tokens immediately on workspace delete (don't wait for the 30-day grace).

harvested_rules.name: Owner-orphan check before delete
harvested_rules.text: Workspace delete requires solo-owner OR explicit ownership transfer to a remaining member.

harvested_rules.name: Confirmation link timeout 24h
harvested_rules.text: Email confirmation links for destructive actions expire in 24h — agent default yesterday morning, reviewer accepted, now a team rule.
